revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{Navseasoncats}} [[Category:Shinto by century]] [[Category:17th century in religion|Shinto]]'

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
